title: jasione humilis var. longidentata
intro: Jasione humilis var. longidentata, a variant of the small, daisy-like Jasione humilis plant, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. The plant, also known as long-flowered bellflower, has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The medicinal properties of Jasione humilis var. longidentata have been reported to help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including colds, flu, and digestive problems.
